title: RTP(Teleport)
description: GUI-based Random Teleport plugin for modern survival servers — with dimension unlocking, smart safety checks, and smooth animated countdowns.
body:
# RTP — Random Teleport

A fully-featured Random Teleport plugin built for modern Paper survival servers. Players open a clean GUI with `/rtp` and choose a dimension to teleport to — with extensive safety checks, smart location spreading, and a smooth countdown experience.


---

##  GUI-Based Teleport Menu

Open `/rtp` to choose your destination from a clean inventory menu:

-  **Overworld** — always available
-  **Nether** — unlocks after your first visit
-  **The End** — unlocks after your first visit

## 🔒 Dimension Unlock System

Players must discover a dimension before they can RTP there. Unlocks are saved to a built-in SQLite database and persist across restarts. Can be disabled in config to make all dimensions available from the start.

## ✅ Advanced Safe Location Detection

Every teleport destination passes strict safety checks before the player is sent there:

- No lava, fire, magma, cactus, sweet berry bushes, powder snow, or water nearby
- Solid ground with clear headspace required
- Full 3×3 area around landing spot verified
- Special platform detection logic for the Nether
- Configurable lava scan radius

## 🎲 Smart Random Distribution

- Weighted randomness for natural location spread
- Per-player location history prevents repeat teleports
- Configurable min/max distance range

## ⚙️ Configuration

- Min & max teleport distance
- Cooldown time between teleports
- Countdown length before teleporting
- Chunk preload radius around destination
- Max search attempts for safe locations
- Allow or block water landing
- Lava scan radius around destination
- Disable dimension lock entirely
